registered: 2026-07-10, Phase 0 (Gate 0) — BEFORE any kernel code exists

decode_bs1_sm86.metric: tokens/s vs dequant + grouped_mm/bmm path, same model same card

train_microbatch_fwd_sm86.metric: s/step forward vs dequant path (backward stays dequant in v1)
train_microbatch_fwd_sm86.note: M~128-256/expert is compute-bound on sm_86 -> parity + energy is the win, not speedup

energy.metric: J/token via nvidia-smi power sampling (Phase-1 harness)
energy.threshold: strictly below the dequant path in ALL cells
energy.context: deletes the measured 1.2-2.3x NF4 energy penalty (METHODOLOGY §10) whose mechanism is the dequant round-trip

fidelity.P-fid: fused error vs fp64 <= dequant-path error vs fp64 (median over census shapes)

gate_2_go_no_go: thresholds met at bs1 decode on sm_86 OR a roofline-backed narrowing of claims recorded; passing flips the repo public with receipts; missing honestly is a publishable negative result
baselines_to_beat: dequant -> bf16 grouped_mm/bmm (the current e4b product path)
Unsloth UNSLOTH_MOE_BACKEND grouped_mm / unsloth_triton (where shapes allow)
Marlin / Marlin-MoE where runnable (expect skinny-shape collapse — MEASURE it)
bnb gemv_4bit at bs1 (the existing NF4-aware reference; per-expert loop)

roofline_notes.decode_bs1: memory-bound everywhere (AI~3.5 vs machine balance ~111 sm_86); byte-ratio driven, robust to peak-FLOPs fine print
roofline_notes.prefill_and_train: compute-bound at M~64-256 -> ceiling vs bf16 ~1.0x; the claim there is energy + no bf16 materialization, registered as such
roofline_notes.dequant_baseline_conservatism: two-pass byte model is a LOWER bound for the baseline's cost; cache-resident reality can only shrink our measured speedup — conservative direction

census_pin: census/shape_census.json (OLMoE-1B-7B, Qwen3-30B-A3B, Gemma-4-26B-A4B, GPT-OSS-120B; configs fetched 2026-07-10)
convention_pin: bitsandbytes #1949 (merged 2026-05-21, milestone v0.50.0): op gemm_4bit, fp32 absmax + nested trio absmax_8bit/code/offset, canonical [N,K] packed, blocksize {32..4096}; 'E4M4' NOT found in merged source — recorded in KERNEL_CONTRACT.md deviations
